name: TOP_ASSIGNEE_BY_TARGET
description: Top assignee by target. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol: $target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 1

examples: Among patents involving IL17F, which assignee filed the largest number?
Among patents involving IL13RA2, which assignee filed the largest number?
Among patents involving EPN1, which assignee filed the largest number?
